title: paeonia lactiflora f. pilosella
intro: Paeonia lactiflora f. pilosella is a variety of the peony plant, specifically a cultivar known for its hairy stems and leaves, often used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Paeonia lactiflora f. pilosella include its ability to soothe and calm the body, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting relaxation and sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
